title: Adam Larter Who Remembers The 90S
description: Not a lot has been written about the decade 'the nineties' and so Adam Larter will FINALLY try to get to the bottom of what happened in this decade. Expect well researched journalism and not a load of surreal nonsense. "One of the most stupidly brilliant things you''ll see this Fringe." Fest "There's certainly plenty to look at and for a lot of the time the audience is entranced by the sheer volume of physical chaos happening on and off the stage." The Scotsman "Looking more like Andy Kaufman than ever." Chortle WINNER - Event of the Year - Chortle Awards 2018 WINNER - Liberty Award - Leicester Comedy Festival - 2024 FINALIST - Not so New Comedian of the Year - 2023 NOMINEE - Best Show - Leicester Comedy Festival - 2021 & 2022 Directed by Ali Brice
